name: Graham Cracker Fruitcake
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces (2 cups) jar maraschino cherries, pits removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the graham crackers in a food processor.
2. Halve the maraschino cherries and reserve the juice.
3. Blend the crumbs, raisins, nuts, halved cherries (and juice), and nutmeg in a very large bowl until well combined.
4. Set aside to cool completely.
5. In a large saucepan over low heat, melt the marshmallows and butter together.
6. Add this mixture to the crumb mixture and blend well with your hands, ensuring everything is thoroughly incorporated.
7. Wash your hands clean.
8. Line the graham cracker box with foil.
9. Pack the mixture into the lined box and refrigerate for several hours until firm.
10. To vary: use green and red cherries and/or a small amount of candied fruit.
